## RECOMMENDED ACTIONS

### Phase 1: Move Historical Files (Safe, Non-Destructive)

```bash
# Create directory structure
mkdir -p docs/historical/v16_2
mkdir -p docs/gemini_sessions/debates
mkdir -p docs/gemini_sessions/reviews
mkdir -p docs/validation_archives/proofs
mkdir -p docs/validation_archives/validations

# Move v16.2 files
mv AutoGenerated/CERTIFICATES_v16_2_FINAL.json docs/historical/v16_2/
mv AutoGenerated/GATES_72_v16_2.json docs/historical/v16_2/
mv AutoGenerated/visualization_manifest_v16_2.json docs/historical/v16_2/
mv AutoGenerated/wolfram_validation_G25_G30.json docs/historical/v16_2/

# Move Gemini session files
mv AutoGenerated/gemini_*.json docs/gemini_sessions/
mv AutoGenerated/gemini_debates docs/gemini_sessions/debates
mv AutoGenerated/gemini_reviews docs/gemini_sessions/reviews

# Move legacy validation files
mv AutoGenerated/wolfram_results.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/proof_manifest.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/validation_report.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/THEORY_OUTPUT_VALIDATION_REPORT.md docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/simulations-index.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/sensitivity_report.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/sterility_report.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/named_constants.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/certificate_compliance_report.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/ghost_literal_report.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/formula_section_audit.json docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/proofs docs/validation_archives/
mv AutoGenerated/validations docs/validation_archives/

# Move special case files
mv AutoGenerated/gnostic_constants.json docs/historical/
mv AutoGenerated/discovery_claims.json docs/historical/
mv AutoGenerated/theory_covariance.json docs/historical/
mv AutoGenerated/theory_output_review*.pdf docs/historical/
```

### Phase 2: Delete Malformed File

```bash
# Delete malformed command file
rm 'AutoGenerated/certificates" && cp h:GithubPrincipiaMetaphysicasimulationsAutoGeneratedcertificateswa_dark_energy.json h:GithubPrincipiaMetaphysicaAutoGeneratedcertificates"'
```

### Phase 3: Verify Active Generation Scripts

Run verification to confirm which files are still being generated:

```bash
# Run all simulations and check which files are created/updated
python simulations/run_all_simulations.py

# Check timestamps to see what was regenerated
ls -lt AutoGenerated/ | head -30
```

### Phase 4: Update .gitignore

Add to `.gitignore` to prevent docs/ archives from being tracked:

```

docs/historical/
docs/gemini_sessions/
docs/validation_archives/
```
